args.query: SELECT "Index", COUNT(*) AS n_rows, MIN("Date") AS min_date, MAX("Date") AS max_date FROM index_trade GROUP BY "Index";

exec_args.sql: SELECT "Index", COUNT(*) AS n_rows, MIN("Date") AS min_date, MAX("Date") AS max_date FROM index_trade GROUP BY "Index";

args.query: SELECT "Index", SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days FROM index_trade WHERE strptime("Date", '%d %b %Y, %H:%M') >= DATE '2018-01-01' AND strptime("Date", '%d %b %Y, %H:%M') < DATE '2019-01-01' GROUP BY "Index";

exec_args.sql: SELECT "Index", SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days FROM index_trade WHERE strptime("Date", '%d %b %Y, %H:%M') >= DATE '2018-01-01' AND strptime("Date", '%d %b %Y, %H:%M') < DATE '2019-01-01' GROUP BY "Index";

args.query: SELECT "Index", SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days FROM index_trade WHERE try_strptime("Date", '%d %b %Y, %H:%M') >= DATE '2018-01-01' AND try_strptime("Date", '%d %b %Y, %H:%M') < DATE '2019-01-01' GROUP BY "Index";

exec_args.sql: SELECT "Index", SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days FROM index_trade WHERE try_strptime("Date", '%d %b %Y, %H:%M') >= DATE '2018-01-01' AND try_strptime("Date", '%d %b %Y, %H:%M') < DATE '2019-01-01' GROUP BY "Index";

args.code:
import json, pandas as pd

data = var_call_Z3HStd2MVatqUPImpEr8q5oY

df = pd.DataFrame(data)
# convert to numeric
for c in ['up_days','down_days']:
    df[c] = pd.to_numeric(df[c])

# North America indices: NYSE (NYA), NASDAQ (IXIC), Toronto (GSPTSE)
na = df[df['Index'].isin(['NYA','IXIC','GSPTSE'])].copy()
na['more_up_than_down'] = na['up_days'] > na['down_days']
res = na[na['more_up_than_down']].sort_values('Index')[['Index','up_days','down_days']].to_dict(orient='records')
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(res))

import json, pandas as pd

data = var_call_Z3HStd2MVatqUPImpEr8q5oY

df = pd.DataFrame(data)
# convert to numeric
for c in ['up_days','down_days']:
    df[c] = pd.to_numeric(df[c])

# North America indices: NYSE (NYA), NASDAQ (IXIC), Toronto (GSPTSE)
na = df[df['Index'].isin(['NYA','IXIC','GSPTSE'])].copy()
na['more_up_than_down'] = na['up_days'] > na['down_days']
res = na[na['more_up_than_down']].sort_values('Index')[['Index','up_days','down_days']].to_dict(orient='records')
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(res))
